caption: A woman with dark hair tied in a bun and styled in braids on the side is recorded in a podcast setting. She wears a dark green t-shirt with a circular red and white graphic and the text "SSTALK 101" on the front. She is positioned behind a black table with a professional microphone and wearing black over-ear headphones. Behind her is a black backdrop featuring a photo of a person and white text that reads "SS TALK 101", "It's A Unique Hustle", "CAST", and "About It!". Small red and white logos for "BOSS TALK 101" appear on the screen. Across the sequence, the woman speaks into the microphone, transitioning from a neutral expression with her hands out of view to gesturing with her open palms as she speaks. The camera remains stationary, focusing on her upper body and the surrounding equipment.
